## Checklist

- [ ] I opened or linked an issue (or this change is trivial docs/typo)
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and kept the PR focused
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour, scope, or architecture changed
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) updated under **Unreleased** (if user-facing)
- [ ] I considered whether [README.md](../README.md) needs updating ([Decision-0001](../decisions/Decision-0001.md))
- [ ] Tests added or updated (when test stack exists)
